name: Asparagus Strata
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove crusts from 4 bread slices and place them in a greased 8-inch x 8-inch x 2-inch pan.
2. Place a slice of cheese on each piece of bread, then evenly distribute asparagus over the cheese.
3. Cover each with another slice of bread.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, salt, pepper, and mustard.
5. Pour the egg mixture evenly over the bread layers.
6. Refrigerate overnight.
7. Sprinkle additional grated cheese on top.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 45-50 minutes or until the custard is set (a knife inserted comes out clean).
9. As a variation, use ham slices instead of asparagus and top with cornflakes and 4 tablespoons melted butter.
